known_non_critical_issues.QC-002: Python fallback scoring mismatch — priority_score_calculator.py used uniform fallback scores (3.069) because psst_dimensions schema was absent from impact-assessment. LLM semantic selection was used for actual signal prioritization. This is a known architectural tension, non-blocking.
known_non_critical_issues.QC-005: Cross-impact reference string matching — Korean signal references in Section 4 use short labels while Section 2 uses full Korean titles. Jaro-Winkler matching threshold not met. Signals are correctly referenced by content; non-blocking.
known_non_critical_issues.QC-010: Vague language: '향후' appears in Priorities 1,2,3,6 inference sections. These are in the context of 'within 12-24 months' timeframes which are specific; borderline case, non-blocking.
known_non_critical_issues.QC-012: Time horizon keyword count in Section 5 is 2 (minimum threshold). Section 5 does contain explicit ranges (0-6개월, 6-18개월) in headers; keyword detection may not count header text. Non-blocking.

recommendation: PROCEED — no must-fix issues. Report meets all quality minimums: 0 CRITICAL failures across L2a+L2b, Grade A semantic depth, all 9 signal fields present for all 10 priorities, all 8 sections complete, Korean output confirmed.
